title: Implementing a Simple Book API
statement: Design and implement a basic API for managing books. The API should have the following endpoints: * GET /api/books: Return a list of all books. * POST /api/books: Create a new book. The request body should contain the title and author of the book. The book's ID should be auto-generated. * GET /api/books/:id: Retrieve a specific book by its ID. * PUT /api/books/:id: Update a specific book. The request body should contain the updated title and author. * DELETE /api/books/:id: Delete a specific book. You can use an in-memory array to store the books. Make sure to handle errors and edge cases.
constraints: Must use only the in-memory array provided to store books.
Must use Express.js for building the API.

endpoints.description: Return a list of all books
Create a new book. Request body should contain title and author.
Retrieve a specific book by its ID
Update a specific book. Request body should contain updated title and author.
